## [00:00 - 01:32]

This is the Pubcast Shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're going to talk about my quick growth on TikTok. Let's go! Here's how I grew to 10,000 followers in six months on TikTok. Stop. I just want to make it really clear that the number of followers isn't all that important. I mean, it matters a little bit, but it is not everything. First, ads. So for about the first month and a half, I did run some ads that resulted in more than 3,000 of my followers. Second, consistency. This was important both for me and my audience. Because I'm consistent, my audience expects a new video. And I also expect to create one. So I build this into my routine and there are no excuses. Third, volume. I created 70 videos during the first month. It was painful, but it was necessary in order to learn and get better and more efficient. I've created at least one video every day of 2023 so far and I've created over 270 videos during these six months. That volume and velocity help you learn and also gives you more opportunities to find what works. Hope that helps. Follow for more. So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
